description: Command allows suppressing visualization of FRIENDLY, ENEMY, MINES and/or PING map indicators from difficulty setting EXTENDED MAP CONTENT.
examples:
Disable visualization of friendly and enemy units:
<sqf>disableMapIndicators [true, true, false, false];</sqf>
name: disableMapIndicators

Item.desc: [[true]] to disable visualization of friendly units
Item.name: disableFriendly

Item.desc: [[true]] to disable visualization of enemy units
Item.name: disableEnemy

Item.desc: [[true]] to disable visualization of all tactical pings
Item.name: disablePing
